summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 (Delete Profile) and REQ-2 (Delete Content) with frontend UI, confirmation dialogs, backend endpoints, and proper post-deletion behavior. All major acceptance criteria appear to be satisfied.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added that converts playbackQueues from Array to List.List representation.
hallucinated_features.reason: Neither REQ-1 nor REQ-2 requested a data migration or any changes to the playback queue data structure. This is extra work not requested in the build spec.
